north_ext.name: NORTH exterior
north_ext.lock: NORTH restaurant: weathered red brick facade, black wooden 6-panel door with brass handle, white serif NORTH sign mounted above the door, large glass window with warm interior light, two terracotta plant pots flanking the entrance, cobblestone sidewalk in front — same building appearance across every scene
